expect: Wiring historian_router.py into periodics and enhancing domain-global link detection will raise synthesis coverage from 4 to >=6 domains within 5 sessions
actual: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED. Three-mechanism analysis: (1) structural links 10.4%->16.5% via crosslink t=7 (+20 annotations, 7 domains); (2) historian routing 4->5 synthesis candidates (+expert-swarm). Dual bottleneck: crosslinks AND merged lanes must BOTH be present. 11/12 global frontiers reachable. Link edges 17->26 (+53%).
diff: Expected >=6 candidates, got 5. Single-bottleneck mental model wrong — dual bottleneck. Coverage improved structurally but routing improvement marginal.
